message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber

participant "TraderClient" as TraderClient
participant "CommandBuilder" as CommandBuilder
participant "TransactionManager" as TransactionManager
participant "StockBroker" as StockBroker
participant "TraderAccount" as TraderAccount
participant "SellStockCommand" as SellStockCommand
participant "Mediator" as Mediator
participant "TraderPolicy" as TraderPolicy
participant "PriceProvider" as PriceProvider

TraderClient -> CommandBuilder : create_command(SellStockCommand)
activate CommandBuilder
CommandBuilder --> TraderClient : SellStockCommand
deactivate CommandBuilder
TraderClient -> TransactionManager : command_signal(SellStockCommand)
@enduml
```
